name: orbeetle
flavor_texts: It’s famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power.
It emits psychic energy to observe and study what’s around it—and what’s around it can include things over six miles away.
text: Orbeetle is the Seven Spot Pokémon. It is a bug and psychic-type Pokémon. Abilities: swarm, frisk, telepathy (hidden). Base stats — HP: 60, Attack: 45, Defense: 110, Sp. Atk: 80, Sp. Def: 120, Speed: 90. Evolution line: blipbug → dottler → orbeetle. Lore: It’s famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power. It emits psychic energy to observe and study what’s around it—and what’s around it can include things over six miles away.
